title: Astin
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Astin''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that sent a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] to destroy a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Probe droid|probe]] called [[PR-V74]] near [[Klaymor 4-2]] which was 15 [[Kilometer/Legends|Klicks]] from its location. After the fighter was destroyed the probe the ship returned to pick up the fighter. The fighter returned despite a Rebel [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Rogelo]]'' arrived to launch [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] at the craft.

{{Ship-stub}}
